query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.line_items (
                    id, tenant_id, shipping_destination_id, product_id,
                    name, quantity, unit_price, discount, billing_cycle,
                    quotes_id
                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                    shipping_destination_id = VALUES(shipping_destination_id),
                    name = VALUES(name),
                    quantity = VALUES(quantity),
                    unit_price = VALUES(unit_price),
                    discount = VALUES(discount),
                    billing_cycle = VALUES(billing_cycle)
